description: The FeedSliderInterface component is used as a template type item in data feed mappers in the Data Feeds system. This component in particular is used to make sliders for stuff like volume or motion blur.

fields.Value: The field that represents the data that should be read from and written to the source data feed.
fields.Formatting: The field to fill with data on how to format the value for displaying it.
fields.Min: The value Field to fill with the minimum value this feed number can be.
fields.Max: The value Field to fill with the maximum value this feed number can be.
fields.ReferenceValue: The default reference value field for this slider (ex: this is a value that the slider should have by default)
fields.ReferenceValueCleanupRoot: The slot to delete if a reference value is not needed.
